title: categories.features
description: Request the resolved feature definitions (own + inherited) for a category. The result is cacheable by the returned revision; a category.changed event invalidates it. This object validates the request payload; the response shape ({category_id, revision, features:[ResolvedFeature]}) is documented in $defs for consumers.

category_id.description: ID of the category whose feature schema to resolve.

ResolvedFeature.description: One resolved feature in the response 'features' array. Fed to stapel-attributes' coerce_feature_defs / FeatureDef. show_at_title, show_as_badge and translate MUST be present: attributes' dto_to_dao reads them to build the title/badge projections.

slug.description: Payload key the feature is submitted under.

show_at_title.description: Whether the value is shown in the listing title.

show_as_badge.description: Whether the value is shown as a badge.

config.description: Type-specific config (merged with type defaults), with a 'type' discriminator.
